name: Highlight
description: Highlight given part of a string with mark
searchText: highlight highlight given part of a string with mark @mantine/core /core/highlight children color gradient highlight highlightstyles inherit inline lineclamp size span truncate wholeword

props.name: children
props.description: String in which to highlight substrings

props.name: color
props.description: Default background color for all highlighted text. Key of theme.colors or any valid CSS color, passed to Mark component. Can be overridden per term when using HighlightTerm objects.

props.name: gradient
props.description: Gradient configuration, ignored when variant is not gradient

props.name: highlight
props.description: Substring(s) to highlight in children. Can be: - string: single term - string[]: multiple terms with same color - HighlightTerm[]: multiple terms with custom colors per term - Matching is case-insensitive - Regex special characters are automatically escaped - When multiple substrings are provided, longer matches take precedence - Empty strings and whitespace-only strings are ignored

props.name: inherit
props.description: Determines whether font properties should be inherited from the parent

props.name: lineClamp
props.description: Number of lines after which Text will be truncated

props.name: truncate
props.description: Side on which Text must be truncated, if true, text is truncated from the start

props.name: wholeWord
props.description:
Only match whole words (adds word boundaries to regex).
When enabled, 'the' will not match 'there'.
